description_long: This is a raised, rectangular cabin with a flat, overhanging roof and a wraparound porch bordered by red railings. The exterior walls are vertically striped in yellow and brown, giving it a vibrant, beachside aesthetic. The cabin is accessed by a wide staircase leading up to the porch, which is supported by sturdy posts and cross-bracing beneath the structure. The front facade features a central door flanked by two panels, while the rear and side facades have large, dark-framed windows. The porch is spacious, providing ample room for movement or seating, and the overall structure is elevated above the ground, likely for flood protection or improved views. The design is reminiscent of lifeguard towers or modern beach cabins, with clean lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A raised, striped cabin with a flat roof, wraparound porch, and wide staircase, featuring bold yellow and brown colors with red railings. The structure is elevated on posts and has large windows and a central door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central door, two adjacent panels, and the full width of the porch with red railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large window, the depth of the porch, and the supporting structure beneath the cabin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two large, dark-framed windows and the wraparound porch, with the staircase visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staircase leading up to the porch, the supporting posts, and a window on the cabin wall.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with wide overhangs on all sides, supported by posts
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large, rectangular windows grouped together on the rear facade, and one large window on each side, all symmetrically placed and framed in dark material
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, flanked by two panels
